summary.shape_sentence: Early squeeze to a morning peak, then a lower-high fade into a sharp early-PM flush, followed by a late rebound that still finished slightly red.

goat.note: Fast early-afternoon liquidation from the mid-25,200s/25,300 area into ~24,980 demand.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered on lower highs and rollover points after the morning peak and before the PM breakdown.

green_circles.behavior: Marked support reactions in the morning advance and again near the afternoon washout low / late rebound.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply stacked around ~25,280-25,390 early and ~25,210-25,300 later; mostly respected after the initial morning spike.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand stepped lower from ~25,290 through ~25,130 into ~25,000/24,980; upper shelves failed, deepest shelf held.

time_markers.10am_blue: Near the launch into the session high; strong upside expansion around this marker.
time_markers.12pm_red: Late-morning fade / lower-high condition; market was losing lift and setting up the PM selloff.
time_markers.2pm_green: Washout zone near session lows with volatile probing of deep demand.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Close came during a rebound from the lows, but below key midday supply.

takeaway: Bearish rotational day with an early squeeze failure and a decisive early-PM flush, then a late reclaim off deep demand that did not fully repair the session.
